name: moa-bridge
displayName: MoA Bridge - Mixture of Agents for Copilot
description: @moa chat participant — Equal-mode Mixture-of-Agents (Hermes style). v0.7.2: shows [vendor] in model display, removed dead preset/detectPath/scripts code.

disambiguation.description: Multi-perspective analysis with multiple LLM advisors

commands.title: MoA: Configure Models
commands.description: Two-step flow: refs (checkbox multi-select) + aggregator (single-select). Shows all available vscode.lm models sorted by vendor; same-name models across vendors are disambiguated by [vendor] suffix. Stores m.id (unique) — fixes the same-name multi-pick bug.

moa.refModels.description: Reference advisor models (equal-mode MoA). Each item: {role, model}. All refs share the same prompt (moa.sharedRefPrompt); `role` is a display label only, NOT a role specialization. Use 'Moa: Configure Models' command to set this interactively.

role.description: Display label (e.g. 'advisor_1'). Not injected into prompt.

model.description: Substring to match vscode.lm model name, e.g. 'GLM-5.2'

systemHint.description: Deprecated in v2 (equal mode). Kept for backward compat, ignored at runtime.
systemHint.deprecationMessage: Equal-mode MoA ignores per-ref systemHint. Use moa.sharedRefPrompt instead.

moa.aggregator.description: Aggregator (synthesizer) model. Use 'Moa: Configure Models' command to set interactively.

model.description: Substring to match vscode.lm model name

temperature.description: Informational only (vscode.lm doesn't expose per-call temp yet).

moa.parallelRefs.description: Fan out reference advisors in parallel (may cause cascading 4xx/5xx when models have expired subscriptions).

moa.sharedRefPrompt.description: Optional override for the shared prompt prepended to every ref query. If empty (recommended), uses the built-in Hermes _REFERENCE_SYSTEM_PROMPT ported from NousResearch/hermes-agent. All refs get the SAME prompt — diversity comes from model differences, not role assignment.
